strengths: Strong multi-language backend experience with event-driven systems (Dlang in fintech-adjacent contexts)
Proven track record in scaling distributed systems (millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby)
Hands-on contribution to AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (MCP, agentic frameworks)
concerns: Limited direct fintech infrastructure experience (e.g., credit risk, payment flows)
No visible experience with regulated commercial AI systems or multi-jurisdictional compliance
Resume emphasizes breadth over depth in agentic AI architecture (no production multi-agent systems mentioned)
response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong distributed-systems expertise and has contributed to AI-agent infrastructure, but lacks direct fintech or regulated-commercial AI experience. His background aligns with technical depth in event-driven architectures and scalability, though the agentic-AI focus appears more tooling-adjacent than production-system leadership. The gap in domain-specific requirements (credit risk, compliance) and confirmed multi-agent system deployments raises concerns for this role.
